description: AInchors operational framework maturity registry. Updated by /frameworks command and on material changes to any framework.

agile.name: AGILE
live: Notion backlog — User Stories with priority, effort, stream, category
Ticket-first rule (TKT-NNNN) enforced before all ad-hoc work
Sprint planning with Ken each session
Sprint review at sprint close
Morning standup 8AM AEST via Telegram (automated)
Ken approves sprint before work starts
Agile Framework v1.0 approved 2026-05-07 — docs/ainchors-agile-framework-v1.md
QBR cadence defined (quarterly, 1st week)
Sprint cadence locked (1 week, max 6 items, Mon-Sun AEST)
Epic gate defined (OKR-linked, Ken approval required)
Definition of Done formalised per work item type
Velocity tracking introduced (rolling 4-sprint trend)
5 lean ceremonies defined
gaps: First QBR not yet run (scheduled Q3 Jul 2026 — 1st week)
Velocity data accumulating from Sprint 1
Retrospective cadence not yet established (monthly target)
opportunities: Set a fixed sprint length (1 week suggested)
Add velocity tracking to Mission Control
Formalise retrospective as a monthly ceremony
Wire Notion 'Done' date for cycle time measurement
agile.nextStep: Define sprint cadence and add velocity tracking to Mission Control dashboard

itsm.name: ITIL / ITSM
live: Incident management — incident-log.sh, P1-P4 severity (CHG-0059)
PIR trigger for P1/P2 — auto-schedules review within 48hrs (CHG-0059)
Change management — CHG-NNNN, CHANGELOG.md, pre-risky-op checkpoint
Service desk — Yoda as lead, Aria for business stream (QW-3)
Auto-heal — 12 checks nightly at 23:30 AEST, files INC for self-heals (ITSM-US-007)
Health monitoring — 15-min health checks, outage handler (CHG-0058)
Fallback chain validation — hourly cron (CHG-0058)
Asset registry — Notion
Backup — 2AM daily
Diagnostics — /diagnostics, 9 phases, 50 PASS / 8 WARN / 0 FAIL (US27)
gaps: No SLA definitions or SLA breach measurement
Problem management (PRB tickets + KEDB) not yet built
CMDB linkage not implemented (ITSM-US-011 backlog)
PIR process has creation but no closure loop
Capacity planning absent
Release management not formalised
Monthly SLA report not yet automated (US18 backlog)
opportunities: Define SLAs for each service tier (P1=5min, P2=1hr, P3=next sprint)
Build problem management — link recurring incidents to root problems
Close the PIR loop — completion tracking, action item closure
CMDB linkage to asset registry for blast radius analysis
itsm.nextStep: Define SLAs and build PIR closure loop — highest leverage for maturing from L3 to L4

governance.name: GOVERNANCE
live: Shield 🛡️ — 5 security checks (S1-S5), script + daily cron
Lex ⚖️ — 5 legal checks (L1-L5), script + daily cron
Sage 🧪 — 5 QA checks (C1-C5), script + daily cron
Warden 🔍 — model compliance every 15 min, 9 checks
governance-report.sh — full 3-gate runner + executive summary
/governance ad-hoc command
Aria ask-first rule — Aria asks Angie before running gate
Governance tail on all Aria responses
Rule specs locked — SHIELD_RULE_1.md, LEX_RULE_1.md, SAGE_RULE_1.md
Daily sweep crons 22:00-22:10 AEST (Haiku)
gaps: Checks L1-L3 (Lex) and C1-C3 (Sage) are provisional — LLM deferred to daily cron, not real-time
Real content volume through gate is near zero — Angie not yet fully onboarded
Governance metrics not tracked (pass rate, fail rate, avg review time)
No escalation SLA if gate fails twice
Shield/Lex/Sage not yet reviewing Aria's live business stream output at scale
opportunities: Track governance pass/fail rates in sage-qa-log.json — surface in Mission Control
Onboard Angie to trigger real governance gate volume
Add governance health to morning standup report
Build escalation loop when gate fails twice — auto-notify Ken
governance.nextStep: Complete Angie onboarding to generate real governance volume and start measuring pass rates

tom.name: TOM
tom.purpose: Agentic operations — agent team and streams
live: 6 live agents — Yoda, Aria, Shield, Lex, Sage, Warden
Technical stream — Ken + Yoda, fully operational
Business stream — Angie + Aria, nascent
Yoda→Aria daily context bridge (23:00 AEST)
Aria→Yoda daily brief (23:45 AEST)
Dual Telegram bots — Yoda (Ken) and Aria (Angie)
Governance layer covering both streams
6-stage Angie onboarding plan designed
gaps: Business sub-agents not yet built (Social, Content, Marketing, Support, Report — all Planned)
Angie onboarding not yet started (Stage 1 pending)
OC2 hardware not arrived — Aria lives on OC1 temporarily
Cross-instance communication (Tailscale) deferred to OC2
No agent performance metrics or SLA tracking per agent
No agent health dashboard (Mission Control shows status but not health over time)
opportunities: Start Angie onboarding Stage 1 — highest impact for business stream
Define and build first business sub-agent (Social or Content)
Add agent uptime and performance tracking to Mission Control
OC2 planning — migration guide before hardware arrives
tom.nextStep: Start Angie onboarding Stage 1 — unblocks business stream and real governance volume

modelStrategy.name: MODEL STRATEGY

model-policy.json — authoritative per-agent registry
route-model.sh — routing decision engine
Warden 🔍 — 9-check compliance audit every 15 min
Benchmark suite — gemma4-benchmark.sh
Delegation logging — log-delegation.sh (savings estimate per turn)
Monthly review cron — 28th, 09:00 AEST, Ken sign-off required
Model strategy hub — canvas document with benchmark data + decisions
Budget cap proposal to Angie (A$1,500/month)
gaps: Tier A/B/C routing within sub-agent spawning not yet implemented
Delegation log has only 3 seed entries — no real volume yet
qwen3 re-test pending (with /no_think suppression)
Budget cap not yet formally approved by Angie
Haiku savings actuals vs projected not yet measured
OC2 / gemma4:26b delegation evaluation deferred (US34)
opportunities: Wire route-model.sh into all sub-agent spawning (sessions_spawn model param)
Accumulate real delegation data over next 30 days for May 28 review
Approve A$1,500 budget cap with Angie
Re-benchmark qwen3 with /no_think — potential zero-cost T2 option
modelStrategy.nextStep: Let delegation data accumulate until May 28 review. Wire route-model.sh into sub-agent spawning.

knowledgeManagement.name: KNOWLEDGE MANAGEMENT
knowledgeManagement.purpose: AKB — Obsidian vault, Notion, context bridge
live: Obsidian vault — 50+ files across 12 sections
14 Notion databases (backlog, incidents, assets, decisions, etc.)
AKB daily update cron — 3AM AEST reads both stream journals (CHG-0056)
Yoda→Aria shared bridge — yoda-daily-brief.md, context-for-aria.md
Training pipeline tracking — training-pipeline.md
Full update pass completed 2026-04-28 (7 files, 677 insertions)
gaps: Content density low — 4 days of data
Client profiles, meeting notes, course materials empty
No search API integration (Obsidian search not exposed to agents)
Content lifecycle management — no staleness detection beyond daily cron
Notion decision log not systematically updated
Training content pipeline has ideas but no drafted content yet
opportunities: Start populating client profiles when first clients onboard
Aria to draft first training content from Yoda's Day 1-4 work
Add AKB health check to /diagnostics (stale file detection)
Expose Obsidian search to Aria for CEO-level business queries

costManagement.name: COST MANAGEMENT
costManagement.purpose: Full company cost visibility — technology spend, business operating costs, overhead, and cost controls across both streams
costManagement.maturityLabel: Developing/Defined — tech cost solid, business cost thin
live: Technology cost tracker — daily per-model API breakdown (Sonnet/Haiku/Gemma)
3-tier credit alert system ($50/$25/$10 — Ken + Angie notified)
/credit command — balance, today's spend, model breakdown, runway
Daily burn alert — 20:00 AEST, fires if daily spend ≥ $40 USD
Delegation logging — cost per routed sub-task, Haiku vs Sonnet savings
Cost & ROI report — tech cost canvas document
Monthly model review — 28th, cost audit included, Ken sign-off required
Budget proposal — A$1,500/month build-phase cap (pending Angie approval)
gaps: Business operating costs not yet tracked (Angie time, tools, subscriptions, paid ads)
No unified company P&L view combining tech + business costs
Budget cap not yet formally approved by Angie
Cost tracker intraday balance calculation bug (confirmed balance workaround)
No per-feature or per-project cost attribution on the tech side
Paid advertising costs not yet captured (when social ads run)
Tool subscription costs (Notion, Google Workspace, etc.) not logged
opportunities: Add business cost tracking — Angie time (hours × rate), tools, subscriptions, paid ads
Build unified company P&L: total costs (F7) vs total value generated (F8) = company ROI
Angie approves A$1,500 budget cap
Fix cost tracker intraday calc — anchor to confirmed balance timestamp
costManagement.nextStep: Add business operating cost tracking to complete the cost side of the P&L

businessROI.name: BUSINESS ROI
businessROI.purpose: Business value tracking — campaign, funnel, sales conversion, ROI vs tech cost
live: Business value rubric — 5 categories, 14 subcategories, AUD value per unit (CHG-0062)
business-roi.json — running log, summary by category, weekly snapshots
log-business-value.sh — Aria logs every value-generating activity
business-roi-report.sh — full ROI report vs tech cost, ratio, by category
Campaign registry — campaigns.json with full funnel metrics per campaign (CHG-0063)
6-stage marketing funnel — Awareness → Interest → Consideration → Intent → Conversion → Retention
Sales conversion framework — Lead → Prospect → Discovery → Proposal → Closed Won/Lost
campaign-debrief.sh — interactive post-execution metric capture (reach, revenue, conversion)
log-campaign.sh — create/update/close/list/roi commands
Weekly ROI cron — Sunday 18:00 AEST, Angie confirmation prompt
Aria SOUL.md: mandatory campaign tracking and post-execution debrief rule
Seed: CAMP-0001 KL Class 30 Apr (active), 8 value entries, A$4,000 estimated, 10.7x ROI
gaps: No real campaign data yet — Angie business stream not fully active
Value estimates unconfirmed — all at 70% confidence weighting
Social media accounts not yet connected (no platform analytics feed)
Sales pipeline has 0 leads — no conversion data yet
Revenue categories at A$0 — first revenue event not yet occurred
Funnel benchmarks are industry estimates, not AInchors actuals yet
opportunities: Complete CAMP-0001 KL Class debrief when campaign concludes — first real funnel data
Connect Instagram/Facebook analytics to auto-populate reach and impression metrics
First revenue event → confirms rubric accuracy and sets real benchmark
Monthly ROI report combining tech cost (F7) + business value (F8) = company-wide P&L lens
businessROI.nextStep: Angie onboarding Stage 1 — activates business stream and starts generating real value entries
businessROI.description_anchor: Anchors to Framework 8 — Business ROI. Covers the RETURN side. Framework 7 covers the COST side. Together: company P&L.
relatedWork: CHG-0063 (campaign tracking, marketing funnel, sales conversion)

priorityFocusOrder.action: Start Angie onboarding Stage 1 — unblocks business stream AND business ROI data
Define SLAs + PIR closure loop — matures L3 → L4
Complete CAMP-0001 debrief + connect social analytics — first real funnel data
Generate real volume via Angie onboarding
Aria extracts first training content from Days 1-4
Accumulate delegation data until May 28 review

changeLog.event: Initial assessment. 7 frameworks identified. Ken approved.
Framework 8 added: BUSINESS ROI (CHG-0062, CHG-0063). Value rubric, campaign registry, marketing funnel, sales conversion. Ken confirmed 8-framework structure.

Framework 7 expanded: Cost Management now covers ALL company costs (tech + business + overhead), not just tech API spend. CHG-0062/TKT-0020 confirmed as anchoring to Framework 8 (Business ROI). F7+F8 documented as economic engine pair.

economicEngine.description: F7 + F8 together form the company economic engine
economicEngine.costSide: costManagement (F7) — what goes OUT: tech API spend + business operating costs
economicEngine.returnSide: businessROI (F8) — what comes BACK: value generated, revenue, campaign ROI
economicEngine.formula: Company ROI = Business Value Generated (F8) ÷ Total Costs (F7)
economicEngine.currentRatio: 10.7x (A$4,000 estimated value ÷ A$374 tech cost — business costs not yet captured)
